texto: Left unaddressed, chronic anxiety can disrupt many aspects of development, including a child's capacity to learn and ability to connect socially as well as the opportunity for the brain to grow and make connections. In time, children with high levels of anxiety are more likely to face depression, turn to substance use, become less likely to finish high school and may therefore have a harder time keeping a job or managing financially.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Michele Kambolis sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Left unaddressed, chronic anxiety can disrupt many aspects of development, including a child's ca…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, anxiety, children, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e children.
